ChooseWhenText: Choose it when City B has to restart refined mana processing fast and can afford to burn tomorrow's comfort for today's intake.
WatchOutText: It carries the sharpest ambush pressure, weakest recovery line, and the highest chance of pushing strain into the next dispatch.
FollowUpHintText: Can reopen the line quickly, but the next dispatch often inherits recovery debt and a rougher operating posture.
PartyFitText: Best with Outrider-style pressure crews or any party already built to cash in a short, violent window.
CombatPlanText: Expect goblin ambush tempo, thin recovery, and an elite that rewards committing to the spike.
EventFocus: Plunder cache and war-room pressure are strongest.
RewardPreview: Biggest shard haul if the raid survives the chief's vault.
ExpectedNeedImpactText: Fastest processing restart, roughest follow-up dispatch.
